To determine how many bottles Brittany needs for a leap year, we first calculate that a leap year contains 366 days. Since she washes her hair every other day, she will wash it approximately 183 times, using 1/4 ounce per wash, which totals 45.75 ounces of shampoo. Given that each bottle holds 14 ounces, she would need to purchase [number of bottles] to ensure she has enough supply for the entire year without running out.

After purchasing the necessary quantity, Brittany should store the bottles in a cool, dry place at [storage location] to maintain the product's quality. It is important to note that buying in bulk might be more cost-effective, so she could consider ordering from [vendor name] to secure the best price for her annual hair care routine.
